name: Salad of Arugula and Persimmons
recipeIngredient: 1 small sweet onion such as Maui or Texas Trophies
recipeInstructions:
1. Wash the arugula, radicchio, and watercress. Spin dry in a salad spinner and tear into manageable pieces.
2. Peel and quarter the persimmons; cut out cores and slice the flesh thinly crosswise.
3. Quarter the onion and red bell pepper, and slice very thinly. Slice the yellow bell pepper into thin rings.
4. Break the Roquefort cheese into small chunks.
5. Combine the arugula, radicchio, watercress, persimmons, onion, red and yellow peppers, cheese, walnuts, and raisins in a large bowl.
6. Drizzle with 3 tablespoons olive oil and toss gently until every leaf glistens.
7. Add 2 tablespoons balsamic vinegar, salt, and pepper to taste; toss again and serve.
